# Edits are overwritten on the next theme change.

# noctalia re-renders templates (i.e. on scheme / dark-mode change).
# The {{...}} placeholder guarantees the output changes when colors
# change, so noctalia rewrites the file and invokes post_hook instead
# of skipping a no-op render.
